meta.title: Add Date & Time to Photos | Timestamp Camera App
meta.description: Timestamp Camera stamps date and time on your photos automatically. Record your meals, workouts, studies, and daily life with proof.
meta.toolTitle: Add Date to Photo Online - Free Tool
meta.toolDescription: Add date and time stamp to your photos online for free. No registration required. Works in your browser.

hero.title:
Stamp Date & Time
on Your Photos
hero.subtitle: Record your meals, workouts, studies, and daily moments. The easiest way to add timestamps to your photos.

items.title: Auto Timestamp
items.description: Automatically stamps the date and time when you take a photo.

items.title: Album Import
items.description: Add timestamps to photos already in your album.

items.title: Various Designs
items.description: Choose from multiple stamp designs and colors.

items.title: Instant Save
items.description: Photos are saved immediately after capture.

items.title: Meal & Workout Log
items.description: Perfect for recording diet meals and exercise routines.

items.title: Study Proof
items.description: Prove your study sessions and wake-up times with timestamped photos.

items.question: Is Timestamp Camera free?
items.answer: Yes, the app is free to use. A premium subscription ($19.99/year) removes ads and unlocks all premium stamp designs.

items.question: Which devices are supported?
items.answer: Timestamp Camera is available on iOS (15.0 or later) and Android devices.

items.question: Can I add timestamps to existing photos?
items.answer: Yes! You can import photos from your album and add timestamp stamps to them.

items.question: Is the timestamp accurate?
items.answer: The timestamp reads the exact date and time from the photo's EXIF data, ensuring accuracy.

items.question: Can I customize the stamp design?
items.answer: Yes, you can choose from various designs and colors. Premium subscribers get access to all stamp designs.

items.question: What can I use it for?
items.answer: Popular uses include meal logging, workout tracking, study proof, wake-up verification, baby growth records, work time documentation, and travel journaling.

tool.title: Add Date to Photo
tool.subtitle: Upload a photo and add a date & time stamp. Free, no registration required.
tool.uploadHint: Drag & drop or click to select
tool.noExif: No date information found in this photo. The current date/time will be used instead.
tool.ctaBanner: Want more stamp designs? Try the app!
